scripts.build: npm run build -w @cph/ui-components && npm run build -w @cph/utils && npm run build -w @cph/feature-x && npm run build -w @cph/feature-y && npm run build -w system-a && npm run build -w system-b
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cph/ui-components && npm run typecheck -w @cph/utils && npm run typecheck -w @cph/feature-x && npm run typecheck -w @cph/feature-y && npm run typecheck -w system-a && npm run typecheck -w system-b
